hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "(git push|deploy|docker compose up)" && cd /c/Users/edgar/Trading-Bot && UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain -- "*.tsx" "*.ts" "*.py" "*.json" | grep -v "^?" | head -1) && [ -n "$UNCOMMITTED" ] && echo "BLOCK: Uncommitted changes detected! Run git status to check." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "(docker compose down|docker rm|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE)" && echo "WARN: Destructive operation detected. Confirm with user first." || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "CHANGELOG.md" && exit 0; echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "\.(tsx|ts|py)$" && echo "INFO: Remember to update CHANGELOG.md before pushing." || exit 0'
